messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "91550565-87cb-411e-a4f6-b07365831456", "article_id": "62dedb15-12a2-4423-b01e-dd2e78bc632e", "source_name": "The Zoe Report", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "celebrity_broadway_debut", "brand": "", "person": "Megan Thee Stallion", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Her latest? A stint playing a gender-bent Zidler in Broadway's Moulin Rouge! The Musical. After her Mar. 24 debut, the rapper-turned-actor left New York City's Al Hirschfeld Theater with her well-earned flowers", "Megan is set to star in Moulin Rouge! The Musical for eight weeks, with her last performance scheduled for May 17"], "anchor_json": {"person": "Megan Thee Stallion", "venue": "Broadway", "production": "Moulin Rouge! The Musical", "date": "2026-03-24"}}, {"event_frame_id": "f66cf8e2-9642-4ade-934a-66b371746324", "article_id": "62dedb15-12a2-4423-b01e-dd2e78bc632e", "source_name": "The Zoe Report", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "celebrity_hairstyle_appearance", "brand": "", "person": "Megan Thee Stallion", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["while wearing a gorgeous blonde 'prom updo'", "In post-show photos taken right outside the theater, Megan was spotted wearing bouncy dark blonde curls piled at the top of her head, with face-framing curtain bangs and just the right amount of tousle"], "anchor_json": {"person": "Megan Thee Stallion", "hairstyle_type": "prom updo", "hair_color": "dark blonde", "occasion": "Broadway debut after-party"}}]}
